Recent Projects

Landing Page Designed & Built

QA Higher Education Progression Hub

Designed and built a lead generation landing page for QA Higher Education's Progression Hub. The page targets undergraduate alumni considering a Masters degree, guiding them through subject areas, university partners, alumni discounts, and funding options all driving toward a course advisor enquiry form.

Website Design & Analytics

Swansea University London Centre

Helped build and maintain the Swansea University London campus site. Designed new pages, managed content, and set up Google Analytics tracking.

Website Quick Turnaround

Northumbria University London

A full website build delivered on a tight deadline for QA Higher Education's Northumbria University London remote learning programme. Designed in Figma and built with Elementor and WordPress, the site targets students looking for 100% online Masters degrees communicating flexibility, NCSC accreditation, and academic support to drive enquiries.
